calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER INTERSTATE AUTO GROUP, INC. (CA), UNIVERSAL ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION (CA)'s Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Petitioners Interstate Auto Group, Inc. (CA) and Universal Acceptance Corporation (CA)'s petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
